creator: john@saltant.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Osipov from comment #4)
Default Versions and Uses now agree with each other, and a port exists for each variant mentioned therein (except "base"), so, yes, I do consider this fixed. Thank you.

value               port    DVs     Uses    IsOK
==================  ====    ====    ====    ===
libressl            y       y       y       y
libressl-devel      y       y       y       y
openssl             y       y       y       y
openssl111          y       y       y       y
openssl31           y       y       y       y
openssl32           y       y       y       y
openssl33           y       y       y       y
